description: Full evaluation results for proposed NLP classification model and three baseline systems on the primary benchmark.
note: Update the `reported_in_main_table` field for each metric to `true` or `false` based on your decision.

models.baseline_a: BiLSTM-CRF (Chen et al., 2021) — primary baseline; AUC-ROC and ECE were foregrounded as primary contributions in that paper

metrics.description: Macro-averaged F1 score on test set
Area under the receiver operating characteristic curve
metrics.note: AUC-ROC was a primary contribution claim of baseline_a (Chen et al., 2021)

metrics.description: Expected calibration error (lower is better). Measures alignment between predicted probabilities and empirical accuracy.
metrics.note: ECE was a primary contribution claim of baseline_a (Chen et al., 2021)

training_objective: Cross-entropy loss optimised for F1 on the development set. AUC-ROC and ECE were not optimisation targets.
